title: chrysojasminum subhumile var. glabricymosum
intro: Chrysojasminum subhumile var. glabricymosum, also known as dwarf jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, as well as its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Chrysojasminum subhumile var. glabricymosum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
